name: PER_ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISORS_F
description: This stores the supervisors associated to a particular assignment. This supports different relationships established between a person and a particular supervisor. One person could have one functional manager (line manager who has absolute control over the person) and a ???project manager??? (project leader who controls a project and organizes resources/people).

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_SUPERVISOR_ID
columns.Comments: System-generated primary key column. Surrogate Key.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Uniquely identifies an assignment. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the worker that has supervisors registered in this table. This is derived from the ASSIGNMEMT_ID record.

columns.Name: PRIMARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Accepts Yes or No values. If yes, then row represent main supervisor.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies the supervisor?s assignment. Foreign Key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Identifies supervisor. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS. This should be derived from the Manager?s assignment record.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TYPE
columns.Comments: Identifies the role this supervisor has with regards to the overall organization structure: functional, project leader, etc.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES

columns.Name: WORKING_PERCENTAGE
columns.Comments: Percentage that person is working for supervisor

columns.Name: FREEZE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze start date (defaulted to End of Time).

columns.Name: FREEZE_UNTIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze until date (defaulted to Start of time).
